aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and structured data to fully optimize for AI search. AI assistants may cite them for localized queries but are less likely for broader HVAC topics.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to capture AI attention for common HVAC queries.
Expand conversational content to align with natural language search patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and boost visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable local search performance.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on energy efficiency and HVAC technology trends.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and structured data.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads as AI assistants overlook their content.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Despite a strong GBP, the website lacks the structured data and conversational tone that AI models prioritize.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Your HVAC Business in San Antonio
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the go-to HVAC authority in San Antonio.
page_title: San Antonio AC Repair & HVAC Services | One Hour®
